questionHtml:
Tiffany would like to repay the loan faster and increases her payments such that she pays 1300 USD each month.

Using your answer from part (a)(ii), calculate the total amount Tiffany will pay over the life of the loan, to the nearest dollar. Do not include the initial down payment.
markschemeHtml:
1156.54×360                    (M1)

416354 USD                    A1

Note: Do not award A1 if answer is not given to the nearest dollar, unless already penalized in part (a)(ii).

[2 marks]

meta.title: Using your answer from part (a)(ii), calculate the total amount Tiffany will pay over the life of the loan, to the nearest dollar. Do not include the initial down payment.
